name: Sachin Patel
tagline: Optimization Engineer · Mathematical Modeling · Decision Intelligence
bio: M.Sc. in Industrial Engineering & Operations Research from IIT Bombay with 1.5+ years of experience building production-grade optimization systems for logistics and supply chain.

I design MILP, Vehicle Routing, and network optimization models, develop scalable Python optimization pipelines, and build decision intelligence platforms that solve complex real-world business problems.

education.institution: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya College, University of Delhi

bullets: Designed and deployed MILP and Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) optimization models in Pyomo using Gurobi, CBC, and GLPK for large-scale logistics planning.
Reduced fleet operating costs and improved vehicle utilization by 10% across 150+ daily routes through production optimization models.
Built backend Python APIs for GPS route analytics and validation, processing 50K+ GPS records while reducing route analysis time by 30%.
Developed automated SQL and MongoDB ETL pipelines with Airflow to support daily optimization workflows and applied machine learning models to improve forecasting accuracy.
Developed customized Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) models using Pyomo with commercial and open-source optimization solvers.
Reduced route planning time from 6 hours to 2 hours, enabling daily optimization and scheduling updates.
Automated data collection, preprocessing, and validation pipelines using Python for large logistics datasets.
Validated routing strategies that contributed to approximately 10% reductions in vehicle usage and transportation costs.

projects.title: LLM-Powered Operations Research Solver
projects.desc: AI-powered platform that converts natural-language business problems into MILP formulations by automatically extracting objectives, constraints, and decision variables, reducing optimization model development from hours to minutes.

projects.title: Supply Chain Digital Twin
projects.desc: Interactive digital twin for logistics operations integrating optimization, simulation, demand forecasting, KPI monitoring, and scenario analysis for supply chain decision intelligence.

projects.title: EV Charging Grid Orchestration
projects.desc: Optimized EV charging infrastructure using demand clustering and Set Cover optimization to maximize geographic coverage while minimizing installation costs.

projects.title: Dark Kitchen Delivery Zone Optimizer
projects.desc: Facility location optimization model that determines optimal cloud kitchen locations using demand clustering and mathematical programming to improve delivery efficiency.

projects.title: Dynamic Pricing Engine
projects.desc: Optimization-driven pricing system combining demand forecasting and price elasticity models to recommend profit-maximizing product prices.

projects.title: Hospital Resource Allocation Optimizer
projects.desc: Mixed Integer Programming model for hospital workforce scheduling and bed allocation, balancing staffing requirements, labor constraints, and patient demand.

projects.title: IPL Team Selection Optimizer
projects.desc: Integer Programming model that selects an optimal cricket squad under budget, role, and team composition constraints using player performance analytics.

projects.title: Vehicle Routing Optimization Engine
projects.desc: Production-inspired Vehicle Routing Problem solver implementing routing optimization with Pyomo and commercial/open-source solvers for logistics planning.

projects.title: Kernel Canonical Correlation Analysis
projects.desc: M.Sc. research extending Canonical Correlation Analysis using kernel methods to capture nonlinear relationships between datasets through optimization-based learning.

achievements.title: JNV Scholar
achievements.subtitle: Selected through Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Entrance Examination
